<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelIgnition\Http\Requests; use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest; use Illuminate\Validation\Rule; class UpdateConfigRequest extends FormRequest { public function rules(): array { return [ 'theme' => ['required', Rule::in(['light', 'dark', 'auto'])], 'editor' => ['required'], 'hide_solutions' => ['required', 'boolean'], ]; } }
